defs: A tally; an account scored on a piece of wood.
quotes: Whether that he paid or took by taille.

defs: Any imposition levied by the king, or any other lord, upon his subjects.
quotes: The taille, as it still subsists in France, may serve as an example of those ancient tallages. It was a tax upon the profits of the farmer, which they estimate by the stock that he has upon the farm.

defs: The French name for the tenor voice or part; also, for the tenor viol or viola.
